subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the Covenant and Testament! Although several letters were received from thee, owing to the multitude of sorrows and occupations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بعهد و پیمان اگرچه چند مکتوب از آنجناب واصل از کثرت احزان و اشغال
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
